notes: concat_ws skips NULL value arguments and inserts the separator between emitted values
concat_ws signature route emits a bounded character value
concat_ws returns NULL when separator is NULL
concat_ws requires at least the separator argument
split_part uses a one-based field index
split_part signature route returns the requested field
split_part propagates NULL input
split_part refuses non-positive field indexes
string_to_array returns a JSON text array payload
string_to_array maps matching null_string elements to JSON null
string_to_array returns NULL array for NULL input text
string_to_array refuses unsupported arity
convert_to returns UTF-8 bytes as binary payload
convert_to signature route accepts UTF-8 spelling
convert_to propagates NULL as binary NULL
convert_to refuses unsupported encodings
convert_from decodes valid UTF-8 bytes to character text
convert_from signature route accepts UTF-8 spelling
convert_from propagates NULL as character NULL
convert_from refuses non-binary input
